title: gymnadenia nigra subsp. corneliana
intro: Gymnadenia nigra subsp. corneliana, also known as the dark-fringed orchid, is a rare and endangered subspecies of orchid native to Italy. It is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, Gymnadenia nigra subsp. corneliana has been used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote respiratory health and soothe irritated mucous membranes.
